query_normalized: asymptotic behavior of random matrix eigenvalues with sparse perturbations mathematics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the asymptotic behavior of eigenvalues (rigidity and empirical distribution) under perturbations where the rank $M$ grows with $N$ (specifically $M=o(N)$), which directly addresses the mechanism of sparse perturbations in random matrix theory.
